_comment: Official Linux App Manager list, pulled by ▾ menu > Import official list. 'follow' subscribes the importer to these GitHub accounts, so every installable repo they publish — now and in future — is auto-discovered with no edit to this file. 'sources' additionally curates flagship apps with polished names; a curated entry wins over the auto-discovered one for the same repo.

sources.name: Riptide
sources.description: Fast parallel download manager (GTK desktop app; also a CLI). Self-contained AppImage.

sources.name: Trellis
sources.description: Hierarchical, spatial note-taking — a tree of free-form card canvases (Rust + egui).

sources.name: Tabby
sources.description: Modern, highly configurable terminal emulator (local / SSH / serial).

sources.name: CherryTree
sources.description: Hierarchical note-taking app with rich text and code syntax highlighting.

sources.name: klogg
sources.description: Really fast log explorer — search and filter very large log files (successor to glogg).
